g.text: 1. INT1 and INT2 are push-pull, leave floating when not used.

g.desc: 1. INT1 and INT2 are push-pull, leave floating when not used.

g.text: 2. Tie SD0/SA0 to ground for I2C address 0x6A.

g.desc: 2. Tie SD0/SA0 to ground for I2C address 0x6A.

g.text: 3. SDX and SCX tied to ground in MODE 1 (slave).

g.desc: 3. SDX and SCX tied to ground in MODE 1 (slave).

g.text: 4. CS tied to VDD when using I2C.

g.desc: 4. CS tied to VDD when using I2C.

g.text: 5. Place 100nF caps close to VDD and VDDIO pins.

g.desc: 5. Place 100nF caps close to VDD and VDDIO pins.
